sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (original_string String, parsed_date DateTime64(3)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY original_string;
UPDATE test_dates SET parsed_date = parseDateTime64BestEffort(original_string, 3) WHERE original_string = '2021-02-02 12:34:56.789';
SELECT original_string, parsed_date, toTypeName(parsed_date) FROM test_dates;
